items: Superintendent Search Firm Selection — Board heard presentations from search firms and selected the firm to lead the national search process. Action item.
Siemens BMS Pre-Construction Services — $67,600 for building management system pre-construction at additional sites for HVAC Phase 2. Measure S Bond Fund.
QKA HVAC Design Services — $1,390,000 with Quattrocchi Kwok Architects for HVAC Phase 2 design at Kennedy, Orion, Clifford. Part of $22.25M total Phase 2 HVAC scope. Measure S Bond Fund.
Spot Cooler Mobile AC Rental Ratification — $155,300 for temporary cooling units during HVAC construction at multiple sites
Dryco Fencing — $19,200 for security fencing around ground-mounted HVAC equipment
Peninsula Community Center PE Program — $626,300 for physical education instruction across district schools for 2025-26

llmResponse.agenda_changes: President Wells moved discussion item 9.1 (School Board Self-Evaluation – Discussion of Results) to after information item 12.3. This change was announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' section and approved by the board.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: The School Board approved the listed Consent Items (Weekly, Li; 5-0), taking the following action:

items.intro_words: Discussion and Action – Superintendent Search Firm Presentations and Selection
Approval of the Pre-Construction Services Agreement with Siemens Building Management Systems
Approval of Contracts with Quattrocchi Kwok Architects (QKA) for Design Services
Ratification of Extended Rental of Mobile Air Conditioning Units from Spot Cooler
Approval of Agreement with Dryco for Installation of Fencing Around Ground-Mounted
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Peninsula Community
Adoption of Resolution No. 8, Approval of Education Code Options for Teaching Assignments
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 3320: Claims and Actions Against the District
School Board Self-Evaluation – Discussion of Results
